content.json:
# Azure Governance Workbook

**Scope:** `{Subscription:label}`

Executive view for tag governance, ownership accountability, and FinOps attribution readiness. This version avoids tile-rendering errors by using **single-purpose stat/scorecard sections and bar/table visualizations** instead of unsupported multi-column tile layouts.

Mandatory tag baseline: `owner`, `costCenter`, `environment`, `application`, `businessUnit`, `criticality`.

## recommendations
- **Focus first on missing owner and costCenter**: these are the highest-value tags for accountability and FinOps attribution.
- **Treat tag debt as an operational backlog**: prioritize resource groups and subscriptions with the most missing owner tags.
- **Make Resource Group tags the control point**: enforce required tags on Resource Groups, then use Azure Policy remediation to populate resources.
- **Use this workbook as a monthly platform governance scorecard** for Cloud Center of Excellence, security, and FinOps stakeholders.

content.query:
Resources
| summarize resourceCount = count() by subscriptionId, resourceGroup
| order by resourceCount desc
content.title: Resource count by resource group

content.query:
resourcecontainers
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| summarize Owner = countif(isempty(owner)), CostCenter = countif(isempty(costCenter)), Environment = countif(isempty(environment))
| project Owner, CostCenter, Environment
content.title: Resource Groups - Missing mandatory tag counts

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| summarize Owner = countif(isempty(owner)), CostCenter = countif(isempty(costCenter)), Environment = countif(isempty(environment)), Application = countif(isempty(application)), BusinessUnit = countif(isempty(businessUnit)), Criticality = countif(isempty(criticality))
| project Owner, CostCenter, Environment, Application, BusinessUnit, Criticality
content.title: Resources - Missing mandatory tag counts

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| summarize resourceCount = count() by environment = iff(isempty(environment), '<missing>', environment)
| order by resourceCount desc
content.title: Environment distribution

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| summarize resourceCount = count() by costCenter = iff(isempty(costCenter), '<missing>', costCenter)
| order by resourceCount desc
content.title: cost center distribution

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| summarize resourceCount = count() by owner = iff(isempty(owner), '<missing>', owner)
| order by resourceCount desc
content.title: Ownership distribution - Resources by owner

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| summarize resourceCount = count() by application = iff(isempty(application), '<missing>', application)
| top 25 by resourceCount desc
content.title: Application distribution - Top applications by resource count

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| extend missingTags = strcat(iff(isempty(owner), 'owner; ', ''), iff(isempty(costCenter), 'costCenter; ', ''), iff(isempty(environment), 'environment; ', ''), iff(isempty(application), 'application; ', ''), iff(isempty(businessUnit), 'businessUnit; ', ''), iff(isempty(criticality), 'criticality; ', ''))
| where isnotempty(missingTags)
| project name, resourceGroup, type, location, owner, costCenter, environment, application, businessUnit, criticality, missingTags
| order by resourceGroup asc, name asc
content.title: Resources missing mandatory tags

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| extend mandatoryTagCount = iff(isnotempty(owner), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(costCenter), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(environment), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(application), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(businessUnit), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(criticality), 1, 0)
| extend isCompliant = iff(mandatoryTagCount == 6, 1, 0)
| summarize totalResources = count(), compliantResources = sum(isCompliant) by subscriptionId
| extend tagDebtResources = totalResources - compliantResources
| top 10 by tagDebtResources desc
| project subscriptionId, tagDebtResources, totalResources, compliantResources
content.title: Top subscriptions by tag debt

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| where isempty(owner)
| project subscriptionId, resourceGroup, name, type, location, costCenter, environment, application, businessUnit, criticality
| order by subscriptionId asc, resourceGroup asc, name asc
content.title: Remediation backlog - Resources missing owner

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| extend gap = strcat(iff(isempty(costCenter), 'missing costCenter; ', ''), iff(isempty(application), 'missing application; ', ''), iff(isempty(environment), 'missing environment; ', ''))
| where isnotempty(gap)
| summarize resources = count() by gap
| order by resources desc
content.title: FinOps attribution gaps

content.query:
Resources
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| extend mandatoryTagCount = iff(isnotempty(owner), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(costCenter), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(environment), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(application), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(businessUnit), 1, 0) + iff(isnotempty(criticality), 1, 0)
| extend isCompliant = iff(mandatoryTagCount == 6, 1, 0)
| summarize totalResources = count(), compliantResources = sum(isCompliant) by type
| extend tagDebtResources = totalResources - compliantResources
| extend compliancePct = iff(totalResources == 0, real(null), round(100.0 * todouble(compliantResources) / todouble(totalResources), 2))
| project type, compliancePct, totalResources, compliantResources, tagDebtResources
| order by tagDebtResources desc
content.title: Compliance by resource type

content.query:
ResourceContainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| extend owner = coalesce(tostring(tags['owner']), tostring(tags['Owner']))
| extend costCenter = coalesce(tostring(tags['costCenter']), tostring(tags['CostCenter']))
| extend environment = coalesce(tostring(tags['environment']), tostring(tags['Environment']), tostring(tags['env']), tostring(tags['Env']))
| extend application = coalesce(tostring(tags['application']), tostring(tags['Application']), tostring(tags['ApplicationName']))
| extend businessUnit = coalesce(tostring(tags['businessUnit']), tostring(tags['BusinessUnit']))
| extend criticality = coalesce(tostring(tags['criticality']), tostring(tags['Criticality']))
| project subscriptionId, resourceGroup = name, owner, costCenter, environment, application, businessUnit, criticality
| order by subscriptionId asc, resourceGroup asc
content.title: Reference - Resource group tag inventory
